name: Genesis
bio: Genesis continues to earn because its pop-era catalog remains active on classic-rock and 1980s playlists while its broader legacy keeps the band culturally visible.
notable_for: A multi-era catalog that bridges progressive-rock history and mainstream 1980s pop-rock crossover success.
career_highlight: Invisible Touch remains one of the band's strongest streaming-era crossover songs.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Genesis's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Genesis's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
